name: Boston Land Survey and Engineering
description: Land surveying and engineering with over 20 years experience, ensuring accuracy in boundary surveys and plot plans for all property types.

sentiment.label: positive
sentiment.summary: Boston Land Survey and Engineering maintains a positive reputation with satisfied clients, though specific review details are not provided in the submitted content.

name: Massachusetts Survey Consultants
description: Full-service commercial and residential land surveying for homeowners, architects, builders, developers, attorneys, and engineers. Services supervised by licensed surveyor with 24+ years experience. Serves Greater Boston, MetroWest, and North Shore.

sentiment.label: positive

highlights.text: I would absolutely hire him again and recommend him to anyone in need of an honest and dependable surveyor.
Excellent service, professionalism, turn-around, communication, and really fair competitive pricing.
Tom was great, did the survey faster than anyone else could and for less money than anyone else would.
Very patient and immediately made the necessary modifications...at no additional charge.

sentiment.summary: Massachusetts Survey Consultants has an overwhelmingly positive reputation with consistent praise for competitive pricing, prompt professional service, and personable staff who exceed customer expectations.

name: Nitsch Engineering
description: Engineering firm with licensed Massachusetts surveyors specializing in various survey types for property, infrastructure, and construction projects.
